# Document the AI Sales Risk Insights feature and Responsible AI controls

## Business Need

After the AI Sales Risk Insights feature is implemented, the repository needs
documentation that explains the feature in plain business language and records
the Responsible AI controls used in the workflow.

## Requested Documentation

Create or update documentation in the repository to explain:

- What the AI Sales Risk Insights panel does.
- What dashboard data or business rules support the insights.
- How a sales manager should use the insights.
- What the feature does not do.
- Why a human review step is still required.
- How this workflow maps to the AugOps 4As: Articulate, Amplify, Assure, and
  Adapt.

## Responsible AI Topics to Include

- Prompt injection and instruction manipulation risk.
- Bias and stereotyping risk.
- Harmful or toxic content risk.
- Private information leakage risk.
- Groundedness and hallucination risk.
- Protected material/copyright risk.
- Resource exhaustion or denial-of-service risk.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Documentation is written in clear, student-accessible business language.
- The documentation is grounded in the actual implemented feature and
  repository files.
- It does not invent capabilities the dashboard does not have.
- It includes a concise Responsible AI checklist that an IS practitioner could
  reuse.
- It includes a short section on limitations and future improvements.

## Assignment

Please implement this documentation issue with Claude and open a pull request
for human review.
